prose: The frontier orbitals task on ethylene was performed using DFT with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set, within the chemkit framework. The calculation used the tier 'standard' in the gas phase. The results are as follows: Homo (highest occupied molecular orbital) energy: -7.61558 eV; Lumo (lowest unoccupied molecular orbital) energy: -0.17987 eV; Homo-Lumo gap: 7.43572 eV. The SCF converged successfully after 6 cycles, and the total electronic energy is approximately -2139.4541 eV. The method used: B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase.
